🔎 Why choose our Diaper Bag ?

👍 LARGE CAPACITY: The cloth bag measures approximately 38 x 26 x 16 cm. If you're looking for a spacious, stylish, durable diaper bag that can hold all your baby's essentials, this is the ideal choice.

 

👍 ERGONOMIC DESIGN: This diaper bag is meticulously designed for on-the-go use. Easy one-handed access to the side slots for baby wipes and the anti-theft pocket on the back allows you to store your phone or wallet. Secure the diaper bag to your stroller with the two included straps.

 

👍 SPACIOUS BACKPACK: This fantastic baby storage bag can hold a variety of baby items. The bag features separate compartments for wet and dry diapers, bottles, and diaper wipes; side pockets are perfect for baby wipes, an umbrella, a water bottle, and more; and three insulated pockets accommodate wide-mouth or narrow-mouth bottles. The wide opening and back zipper ensure easy access.

 

👍 MULTIPLE CARRYING OPTIONS: This backpack can be used as a backpack, handbag, shoulder bag, or crossbody bag. Elegant and stylish, it's suitable for a variety of occasions, including shopping and traveling. Its practical design makes this backpack a great choice for traveling with your baby, and also makes an ideal baby shower gift!

-Material: Oxford fabric

-Size：38*26*16cm

Packing everything you need for a day trip with your little one into a Carry-All Diaper Bag!

The bags that you will love enough to use as your regular bag, with all the intelligent features to make your job easier as parents.

Our wide-opening, easy-access baby bag is designed to keep you hands free and make diapering on-the-go a breeze.

The neutral stylish diaper backpack is more than a mom bag, even dads like to wear it.

The Must-have Hands-free Diaper Bag Backpack for All Smart Parents!

Carry-all wide-opening backpack diaper bag makes it easy to access everything inside due to a structured frame that stays wide open, making the inside completely visible.

Lightweight, waterproof polyester fabric, durable metal hardware and sturdy zippers. Multiple pockets for essentials lets you and your little ones play, work, snack and explore with ease.

It’s a nappy bag you’ll rely on while your child is small and love enough to keep carrying long after the diaper days are gone.

Insulated Bottle Pockets
Features 3 insulated holders to keep bottles warm or cool - great for a long day’s outing with baby! Off-duty parents can enjoy a warm drink during cold days or a cool drink during hot days too!

Back Mommy Pocket
Back deep pockets conveniently located for your belongings, such as wallet, phone etc. Keep your things tidy and safe.
Hands-free & Comfortable
Comes with 2 stroller hooks for when you’re multitasking with your hands.
